# Docker Compose Template: Generic (Any Stack)

Use when technology stack doesn't match Node/Python/.NET/Java, or for mixed/polyglot architectures.

```yaml
# {System Name} — Development Infrastructure
# Generated by AI-DWG | Stack: {technology}
#
# Usage: docker compose up -d
# Tear down: docker compose down -v
version: "3.8"

services:
  # ─── Primary Database ───
  # Replace with your database of choice
  db:
    image: {database-image}:{version}
    container_name: ${PROJECT_NAME}_db
    ports:
      - "{host-port}:{container-port}"
    environment:
      {DB_ENV_VARS}
    volumes:
      - db_data:{data-path}
    healthcheck:
      test: {healthcheck-command}
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3

  # ─── Cache (if needed) ───
  cache:
    image: redis:{version}-alpine
    container_name: ${PROJECT_NAME}_cache
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3

  # ─── Message Broker (if needed) ───
  # broker:
  #   image: {broker-image}:{version}
  #   ports:
  #     - "{port}:{port}"

  # ─── Search Engine (if needed) ───
  # search:
  #   image: {search-image}:{version}
  #   ports:
  #     - "{port}:{port}"

  # ─── Object Storage (if needed) ───
  # storage:
  #   image: minio/minio:latest
  #   command: server /data --console-address ":9001"
  #   ports:
  #     - "9000:9000"
  #     - "9001:9001"

  # ─── Mail (dev email capture) ───
  # mail:
  #   image: axllent/mailpit
  #   ports:
  #     - "1025:1025"
  #     - "8025:8025"

volumes:
  db_data:

networks:
  default:
    name: ${PROJECT_NAME}_network
```

## Selection Logic

Use this template when:
- Primary technology is not Node/Python/.NET/Java
- Architecture is polyglot (multiple languages)
- Custom/uncommon technology stack
- AP doesn't specify standard infrastructure patterns

Replace placeholder services with actual selections from Technology Stack.
